languages.text: "Да будет предан огню сей еретик, склонившийся перед ксеносской мерзостью. Приговор непреложен. Печать поставлена. Во славу Бога-Императора".

traits.locale_text: "Да будет предан огню сей еретик, склонившийся перед ксеносской мерзостью. Приговор непреложен. Печать поставлена. Во славу Бога-Императора".

languages.text: "Let this heretic, who bowed down before the xenos abomination, be consigned to the flames. The sentence is binding. The seal is set. For the glory of the God-Emperor."
languages.original_text: "Да будет предан огню сей еретик, склонившийся перед ксеносской мерзостью. Приговор непреложен. Печать поставлена. Во славу Бога-Императора".

traits.locale_text: "Let this heretic, who bowed down before the xenos abomination, be consigned to the flames. The sentence is binding. The seal is set. For the glory of the God-Emperor."
"Let this heretic, who bowed down before the xenos abomination, be consigned to the flames. The sentence is binding. The seal is set. For the glory of the God-Emperor."
"Let this heretic, who bowed down before the xenos abomination, be consigned to the flames. The sentence is binding. The seal is set. For the glory of the God-Emperor."

languages.text: "Möge dieser Ketzer, der sich der Xenos-Abscheulichkeit beugte, den Flammen überantwortet werden. Das Urteil ist bindend und besiegelt. Für den Ruhm des Gottimperators."
languages.original_text: "Let this heretic, who bowed down before the xenos abomination, be consigned to the flames. The sentence is binding. The seal is set. For the glory of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: "Möge dieser Ketzer, der sich der Xenos-Abscheulichkeit beugte, den Flammen überantwortet werden. Das Urteil ist bindend und besiegelt. Für den Ruhm des Gottimperators."

languages.text: “将此不敬异端，曾跪拜于异形亵渎之物者，投入烈火。此判决具有约束效力。判印已封。愿荣耀归于神皇。”
languages.original_text: "Let this heretic, who bowed down before the xenos abomination, be consigned to the flames. The sentence is binding. The seal is set. For the glory of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: “将此不敬异端，曾跪拜于异形亵渎之物者，投入烈火。此判决具有约束效力。判印已封。愿荣耀归于神皇。”

languages.text: « Que cet hérétique qui a osé se prosterner devant l'abomination xénos soit livré aux flammes. Le verdict est sans appel et son sort scellé. Pour la gloire de l'Empereur-Dieu. »
languages.original_text: "Let this heretic, who bowed down before the xenos abomination, be consigned to the flames. The sentence is binding. The seal is set. For the glory of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: « Que cet hérétique qui a osé se prosterner devant l'abomination xénos soit livré aux flammes. Le verdict est sans appel et son sort scellé. Pour la gloire de l'Empereur-Dieu. »

languages.text: «Condeno a este hereje, que se ha postrado ante los abominables xenos, a morir pasto de las llamas. Se ha dictado sentencia. Su destino se ha sellado. Por la gloria del Dios Emperador».
languages.original_text: "Let this heretic, who bowed down before the xenos abomination, be consigned to the flames. The sentence is binding. The seal is set. For the glory of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: «Condeno a este hereje, que se ha postrado ante los abominables xenos, a morir pasto de las llamas. Se ha dictado sentencia. Su destino se ha sellado. Por la gloria del Dios Emperador».

languages.text: "Zeno iğrençliğinin önünde eğilen bu kâfir, alevlere teslim edilsin. Hüküm bağlayıcıdır. Mühür basılmıştır. Tanrı İmparator çok yaşa."
languages.original_text: "Let this heretic, who bowed down before the xenos abomination, be consigned to the flames. The sentence is binding. The seal is set. For the glory of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: "Zeno iğrençliğinin önünde eğilen bu kâfir, alevlere teslim edilsin. Hüküm bağlayıcıdır. Mühür basılmıştır. Tanrı İmparator çok yaşa."

languages.text: 異端者、異星生物の忌まわしいものに向かって頭を下げた者、炎に捧げよ。この判決は確定する。封印は完了する。神皇帝の栄光のために。
languages.original_text: "Let this heretic, who bowed down before the xenos abomination, be consigned to the flames. The sentence is binding. The seal is set. For the glory of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: 異端者、異星生物の忌まわしいものに向かって頭を下げた者、炎に捧げよ。この判決は確定する。封印は完了する。神皇帝の栄光のために。
